etymology.description: semantic 釆(釆) (biàn, "distinguish") + phonetic 睪(睪) (yì) -> Buddha, to explain, to release
etymology.interpretation: 釆(釆) (biàn, "distinguish") suggests the idea of separating or discerning, which connects to understanding or explaining. The character 睪(睪) (yì) adds a phonetic element. Together, they convey the sense of unraveling or elucidating complex ideas, which aligns with how the teachings of the Buddha aim to provide clarity and liberation.
etymology.simplification: The traditional component 睪(睪) was replaced with 𠬤 (yì) in the simplified form for phonetic similarity while maintaining the semantic logic of differentiation.

examples.chinese: 他能详细地解释这个问题(他能詳細地解釋這個問題)。
examples.pinyin: Tā néng xiángxì de jiěshì zhège wèntí.
examples.english: He can explain this problem in detail.

examples.chinese: 佛陀是佛教的创始者(佛陀是佛教的創始者)。
examples.english: Buddha is the founder of Buddhism.

examples.chinese: 经过深思熟虑后(經過深思熟慮後)，他决定释放那只鸟(他決定釋放那隻鳥)。
examples.pinyin: Jīngguò shēnsī shúlǜ hòu, tā juédìng shìfàng nà zhī niǎo.
examples.english: After careful consideration, he decided to release the bird.
